title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 031
task1_desc: Create a function to check **divide by zero error** without checking if the denominator is zero.
task1_body: Create a function to check **divide by zero error** without checking if the denominator is zero.
task2_desc: Create a script to demonstrate creating **dynamic variable name**, assign a value to the variable and finally print the variable. The **variable name** would be passed as command line argument.
task2_body:
Create a script to demonstrate creating **dynamic variable name**, assign a value to the variable and finally print the variable. The **variable name** would be passed as command line argument.

Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 27th October 2019**.
